eClaims and Preauth APIs
eClaims and Preauth APIs

Billing

Endpointhttps://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1

Endpoints for billing and invoice management.

Resolve POMSF tariffs (bundle-aware)

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/benefits/pmf-tariffs/resolve

Forwards the request to the terminology-service bundle-aware POMSF tariff resolver. When HCW identifier details are supplied the practitioner speciality is derived from the health worker registry and normalised to GP|SPECIALIST before forwarding. Requires the feature flag POMSF_RATES_SOURCE=terminology; when it is unset or set to any other value the resolver is disabled and the endpoint returns 501 Not Implemented.

Resolve POMSF tariffs (bundle-aware) › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Resolve POMSF tariffs (bundle-aware) › Request Body

fr_code
string · required

Facility registry code of the facility the tariffs are requested for.

Example: FID-42-110176-7
intervention_codes
string[] · minItems: 1 · required

SHA intervention codes to resolve tariffs for.

Example: ["PMF-12-001"]
as_of
string

Effective date used to resolve tariffs.

Example: 2026-06-08
hcw_identifier
string

Identifier of the health care worker, matching the identifier type. Example is dummy data.

Example: A00000
hcw_identifier_type
string · enum

Type of identifier supplied for the health care worker.

Enum values:
registration_number
National ID
Alien ID
Refugee ID
hcw_puid
hwc_puid
Example: registration_number
hcw_regulator
string · enum

Regulatory body that registered the health care worker.

Enum values:
KMPDC
COC
NCK
PPB
Example: KMPDC
keph_level
string

KEPH level of the facility used to resolve tariffs.

Example: LEVEL 4
scheme
string

Benefit scheme the tariffs are resolved under.

Example: UHC
speciality
string · enum

Practitioner speciality the tariffs apply to.

Enum values:
GP
SPECIALIST
Example: GP

Resolve POMSF tariffs (bundle-aware) › Responses

OK

object
date_uploaded
string
eligible_to_bill
boolean
facility_level
integer
facility_name
string
fr_code
string
has_negotiated_tariff
boolean
object
is_contracted
boolean
speciality
string · enum
Enum values:
GP
SPECIALIST
Example: GP
unmatched_codes
string[]
without_negotiated_rate
string[]
POST/benefits/pmf-tariffs/resolve
curl --request POST \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/benefits/pmf-tariffs/resolve \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "as_of": "2026-06-08",
  "fr_code": "FID-42-110176-7",
  "hcw_identifier": "A00000",
  "hcw_identifier_type": "registration_number",
  "hcw_regulator": "KMPDC",
  "intervention_codes": [
    "string"
  ],
  "keph_level": "LEVEL 4",
  "scheme": "UHC",
  "speciality": "GP"
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "as_of": "2026-06-08",
  "fr_code": "FID-42-110176-7",
  "hcw_identifier": "A00000",
  "hcw_identifier_type": "registration_number",
  "hcw_regulator": "KMPDC",
  "intervention_codes": [
    "string"
  ],
  "keph_level": "LEVEL 4",
  "scheme": "UHC",
  "speciality": "GP"
}
json
Example Responses
{
  "bundles": {},
  "date_uploaded": "date_uploaded",
  "eligible_to_bill": true,
  "facility_level": 0,
  "facility_name": "facility_name",
  "fr_code": "FID-42-110176-7",
  "has_negotiated_tariff": true,
  "interventions": {},
  "is_contracted": true,
  "speciality": "GP",
  "unmatched_codes": [
    "string"
  ],
  "without_negotiated_rate": [
    "string"
  ]
}
json
application/json

Evaluate POMSF rates

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/benefits/pomsf-rates

Looks up the health care worker in the health worker registry to derive their speciality, then evaluates the published POMSF rates rule set against the provided facility and interventions, returning the parsed tariff entries

Evaluate POMSF rates › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Evaluate POMSF rates › Request Body

fr_code
string · required

Facility registry code of the facility the rates are requested for.

Example: FID-42-110176-7
intervention_codes
string[] · minItems: 1 · required

SHA intervention codes to resolve rates for.

Example: ["PMF-12-001"]
hcw_identifier
string

Identifier of the health care worker, matching the identifier type. Example is dummy data.

Example: A00000
hcw_identifier_type
string · enum

Type of identifier supplied for the health care worker.

Enum values:
registration_number
National ID
Alien ID
Refugee ID
hcw_puid
hwc_puid
Example: registration_number
hcw_regulator
string · enum

Regulatory body that registered the health care worker.

Enum values:
KMPDC
COC
NCK
PPB
Example: KMPDC

Evaluate POMSF rates › Responses

OK

fr_code
string
has_negotiated_rates
boolean
intervention_codes
string[]
is_contracted
boolean
object[]
speciality
string · enum
Enum values:
GP
SPECIALIST
Example: GP
POST/benefits/pomsf-rates
curl --request POST \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/benefits/pomsf-rates \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "fr_code": "FID-42-110176-7",
  "hcw_identifier": "A00000",
  "hcw_identifier_type": "registration_number",
  "hcw_regulator": "KMPDC",
  "intervention_codes": [
    "string"
  ]
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "fr_code": "FID-42-110176-7",
  "hcw_identifier": "A00000",
  "hcw_identifier_type": "registration_number",
  "hcw_regulator": "KMPDC",
  "intervention_codes": [
    "string"
  ]
}
json
Example Responses
{
  "fr_code": "FID-42-110176-7",
  "has_negotiated_rates": true,
  "intervention_codes": [
    "string"
  ],
  "is_contracted": true,
  "results": [
    {
      "facilityName": "facilityName",
      "frCode": "frCode",
      "hasNegotiatedPomsfTariff": true,
      "interventionCode": "interventionCode",
      "interventionName": "interventionName",
      "pomsfDefaultTariff": "pomsfDefaultTariff",
      "pomsfTariff": "pomsfTariff"
    }
  ],
  "speciality": "GP"
}
json
application/json

Add a claim attachment

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/attachments

Adds a supporting attachment (uploaded file) to an existing virtual claim for a given intervention.

Add a claim attachment › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Add a claim attachment › Request Body

consent_token
string

Authorization code from claim creation. Signifies an authorised claim.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV
file_blob
string

The attachment's binary file content.

document_type
string · enum

Type of the supporting document being attached to the claim.

Enum values:
BIO_DETAILS
BIRTH_NOTIFICATION
CARE_PLAN
CASE_NOTE
CASE_SUMMARY
CERTIFIED_BURIAL_PERMIT
CERTIFIED_COPY_OF_DECEASED_ID
CLAIM_FORM
Example: LAB_RESULTS
intervention_code
string

SHA intervention code the attachment is associated with.

Example: SHA-18-005

Add a claim attachment › Responses

Claim attachment added successfully

attachment
string
attachment_type
string
claim
string
data
string
debug_data
string
description
string
id
string
intervention_code
string
last_retry
string
retry_count
integer
title
string
POST/claims/attachments
curl --request POST \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/claims/attachments \
  --header 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \
  --form consent_token=K5HLPJVDNV \
  --form file_blob=file_blob \
  --form document_type=BIO_DETAILS \
  --form intervention_code=SHA-18-005
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "file_blob": "file_blob",
  "document_type": "BIO_DETAILS",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005"
}
json
Example Responses
{
  "attachment": "attachment",
  "attachment_type": "attachment_type",
  "claim": "claim",
  "data": "data",
  "debug_data": "debug_data",
  "description": "description",
  "id": "id",
  "intervention_code": "intervention_code",
  "last_retry": "last_retry",
  "retry_count": 0,
  "title": "title"
}
json
application/json

Remove a claim attachment

PATCH
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/attachments

Removes a previously uploaded attachment from an existing virtual claim.

Remove a claim attachment › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Remove a claim attachment › Request Body

Request payload for removing an attachment from a virtual claim.
attachment_id
string · required

Identifier of the attachment to remove from the claim.

Example: 3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301
consent_token
string · required

Patient consent token authorising the change.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV
intervention_code
string · required

SHA intervention code the attachment is linked to.

Example: SHA-18-005

Remove a claim attachment › Responses

Claim attachment removed successfully

Standard success response format for all successful operations.
object

@Description Response data payload containing operation details @Example {"status": "success"}

message
string

@Description Success message describing the operation result @Example "Visit has been successfully started"

PATCH/claims/attachments
curl --request PATCH \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/claims/attachments \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "attachment_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005"
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "attachment_id": "3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301",
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005"
}
json
Example Responses
{
  "data": {},
  "message": "message"
}
json
application/json

Add a diagnosis to a claim

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/diagnoses

Adds a diagnosis (ICD code) to an existing virtual claim for a specific intervention.

Add a diagnosis to a claim › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Add a diagnosis to a claim › Request Body

consent_token
string · required

Beneficiary consent token authorizing the diagnosis to be added.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV
icd_code
string · required

ICD-10 diagnosis code being added to the claim or preauthorization.

Example: A09
intervention_code
string · required

SHA intervention (benefit package) code the diagnosis is associated with.

Example: SHA-18-005
practitioner_identification_number
string

Optional. Identification number of the attending practitioner (doctor). Provide the identification number, identification type and regulation body together to attach the doctor to the claim if they were not added before. The same doctor details can be supplied through any of the three endpoints — Create Virtual Claim, Add Diagnosis, or Add Billable Line Item. Example is dummy data.

Example: A00000
practitioner_identification_type
string · enum

Optional. Type of identifier used for the attending practitioner (doctor).

Enum values:
registration_number
National ID
Alien ID
Refugee ID
Example: registration_number
practitioner_regulation_body
string · enum
Enum values:
KMPDC
COC
NCK
PPB
KMPDC
COC
NCK
PPB
Example: KMPDC

Add a diagnosis to a claim › Responses

diagnosis added successfully

claim
string
claim_diagnosis_id
integer
diagnosis
string
diagnosis_code
string
diagnosis_name
string
edi_claim_diagnosis_guid
string
edi_claim_diagnosis_replicated
string
intervention_code
string
is_flagged_diagnosis
boolean
is_inpatient
boolean
original_visit_date
string
patient_number
string
recorded_on
string
site_code
string
site_code_type
string
visit_number
string
POST/claims/diagnoses
curl --request POST \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/claims/diagnoses \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "icd_code": "A09",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005",
  "practitioner_identification_number": "A00000",
  "practitioner_identification_type": "registration_number",
  "practitioner_regulation_body": "KMPDC"
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "icd_code": "A09",
  "intervention_code": "SHA-18-005",
  "practitioner_identification_number": "A00000",
  "practitioner_identification_type": "registration_number",
  "practitioner_regulation_body": "KMPDC"
}
json
Example Responses
{
  "claim": "claim",
  "claim_diagnosis_id": 0,
  "diagnosis": "diagnosis",
  "diagnosis_code": "diagnosis_code",
  "diagnosis_name": "diagnosis_name",
  "edi_claim_diagnosis_guid": "edi_claim_diagnosis_guid",
  "edi_claim_diagnosis_replicated": "edi_claim_diagnosis_replicated",
  "intervention_code": "intervention_code",
  "is_flagged_diagnosis": true,
  "is_inpatient": true,
  "original_visit_date": "original_visit_date",
  "patient_number": "patient_number",
  "recorded_on": "recorded_on",
  "site_code": "site_code",
  "site_code_type": "site_code_type",
  "visit_number": "visit_number"
}
json
application/json

Add a billable line item to a claim

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/lines

Adds a billable line item to an existing virtual claim; accepts a JSON body or multipart form-data. unit_price and quantity are required.

Add a billable line item to a claim › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Add a billable line item to a claim › Request Body

oneOf
Exactly one variant must match.

Decision Table

VariantMatching Criteria
type = object · requires: consent_token, intervention_code, unit_price +1 more
type = object · requires: consent_token, intervention_code, unit_price +1 more
Properties for Single Line Item:
Adds a single billable line item to a claim's invoice. Sent as a raw JSON body. Optionally include the attending practitioner's details by supplying the three practitioner fields together.
consent_token
string · required

Authorization code from claim creation. Signifies an authorised claim.

Example: 8EUTW6AQF5
intervention_code
string · required

Intervention code for the service being billed.

Example: SHA-09-021
unit_price
string · required

Unit price of the service. A numeric value sent as a string.

Example: 300
quantity
string · required

Quantity billed. A numeric value sent as a string.

Example: 1
service_name
string

Human-readable name of the service being billed.

Example: Basic consultation
service_identifier
string

Facility's own identifier for the service.

Example: C/123
practitioner_identification_type
string · enum

Optional. Identification type of the attending practitioner (doctor). Supply the three practitioner fields together to attach the doctor's details to the line.

Enum values:
registration_number
National ID
Alien ID
Refugee ID
Example: registration_number
practitioner_identification_number
string

Optional. Identification number of the attending practitioner (doctor). Provide the identification number, identification type and regulation body together to attach the doctor to the claim if they were not added before. The same doctor details can be supplied through any of the three endpoints — Create Virtual Claim, Add Diagnosis, or Add Billable Line Item. Example is dummy data.

Example: A00000
practitioner_regulation_body
string · enum

Optional. Regulation body the attending practitioner is registered with.

Enum values:
KMPDC
COC
NCK
PPB
Example: KMPDC

Add a billable line item to a claim › Responses

Claim line item added successfully

Remove a claim line

PATCH
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/lines

Removes a line item from an existing virtual claim. The line_guid in the request is the id of the line taken from the claim's invoices.lines.

Remove a claim line › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Remove a claim line › Request Body

Request payload for removing a line item from a virtual claim.
consent_token
string · required

Patient consent token authorising the change.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV
line_guid
string · required

GUID of the claim line item to remove.

Example: a1b2c3d4-5678-90ab-cdef-1234567890ab

Remove a claim line › Responses

Claim line removed successfully

Standard success response format for all successful operations.
object

@Description Response data payload containing operation details @Example {"status": "success"}

message
string

@Description Success message describing the operation result @Example "Visit has been successfully started"

PATCH/claims/lines
curl --request PATCH \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/claims/lines \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "line_guid": "a1b2c3d4-5678-90ab-cdef-1234567890ab"
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "line_guid": "a1b2c3d4-5678-90ab-cdef-1234567890ab"
}
json
Example Responses
{
  "data": {},
  "message": "message"
}
json
application/json

Edit a claim line

PATCH
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/lines/edit

Edits an existing line item in a virtual claim. Allowed only on RESUBMISSION, and an edit may only adjust an amount DOWNWARD. The line_id in the request is the id of the line taken from the claim's invoices.lines.

Edit a claim line › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Edit a claim line › Request Body

Request payload for editing an existing line item in a virtual claim.
consent_token
string · required

Patient consent token authorising the claim line edit.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV
line_id
string · required

Unique identifier of the claim line item to edit.

Example: a1b2c3d4-5678-90ab-cdef-1234567890ab
quantity
integer

Updated quantity for the claim line item.

Example: 2
unit_price
string

Updated unit price for the claim line item, in KES.

Example: 1500

Edit a claim line › Responses

Claim line edited successfully

attributes
string
bill_from
string
bill_to
string
charge_date
string
discount
number
discount_reason
string
doctor_code
string
doctor_name

string
invoice
string
is_active
boolean

boolean
is_return
boolean
item_code
string
item_name
string
line_copay
number
line_net_amount
number
line_number
string
line_total_amount
number
linked_invoice_line
string
map_request
string
map_request_description
string
mapped_slade_code
string
nhif_rebate_amount
number
patient_discount_amount
number
patient_net_price
number
pmf_line_status
string
quantity
number
scheme_code
string
scheme_name
string
sponsor_net_price
number
uhc_exceeded
boolean
unit
string
unit_price
number
PATCH/claims/lines/edit
curl --request PATCH \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/claims/lines/edit \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV",
  "line_id": "a1b2c3d4-5678-90ab-cdef-1234567890ab",
  "quantity": 2,
  "unit_price": "1500"
}
'
shell

Resubmit a claim line

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/lines/resubmit

Resubmits a previously rejected or failed claim line so it can be reprocessed.

Resubmit a claim line › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Resubmit a claim line › Request Body

Request payload for resubmitting a claim line that was previously rejected or failed.
consent_token
string · required

Consent token authorising resubmission of the claim line.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV

Resubmit a claim line › Responses

Claim line resubmitted successfully

line_id
string
message
string
resubmitted_at
string
status
string
POST/claims/lines/resubmit
curl --request POST \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/claims/lines/resubmit \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV"
}
'
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "consent_token": "K5HLPJVDNV"
}
json
Example Responses
{
  "line_id": "line_id",
  "message": "message",
  "resubmitted_at": "resubmitted_at",
  "status": "status"
}
json
application/json

Preview a provider claim

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/preview

Previews the details of a virtual claim as the provider before submission, so the assembled claim can be reviewed.

Preview a provider claim › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Preview a provider claim › Request Body

Request payload for previewing a virtual claim before submission. Requires consent token.
consent_token
string · required

Consent token from the authorization/visit step, identifying the claim to preview.

Example: K5HLPJVDNV

Preview a provider claim › Responses

Claim preview retrieved successfully

object[]

Preview a payer claim

GET
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/claims/preview/payer

Previews how a claim will appear to the payer before submission. Identify the claim by its claim invoice guid, or alternatively by its provider_claim_no.

Preview a payer claim › query Parameters

guid
string · required

Claim invoice guid (alternatively provide provider_claim_no)

Example: 3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301
provider_claim_no
string · required

Provider claim number (alternative to guid)

Example: IP/783/33956

Preview a payer claim › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Preview a payer claim › Responses

Payer claim preview retrieved successfully

pageSize
integer
object[]
GET/claims/preview/payer
curl --request GET \
  --url 'https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/claims/preview/payer?guid=%3Cstring%3E&provider_claim_no=%3Cstring%3E'
shell

json
application/json

Upload a file

POST
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/uploads

Uploads a file and returns its storage identifier together with presigned URLs for inline preview and save-as download.

Upload a file › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Upload a file › Request Body

file
string

Upload a file › Responses

File stored successfully

download_url
string
expires_in_seconds
integer
file_id
string
preview_url
string
POST/uploads
curl --request POST \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/uploads \
  --header 'Content-Type: multipart/form-data' \
  --form file=file
shell
Example Request Body
{
  "file": "file"
}
json
Example Responses
{
  "download_url": "download_url",
  "expires_in_seconds": 0,
  "file_id": "file_id",
  "preview_url": "preview_url"
}
json
application/json

Get file download URL

GET
https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1
/uploads/{file_id}

Generates a pre-signed download URL for a previously uploaded file.

Get file download URL › path Parameters

file_id
string · required

File ID returned when the file was uploaded

Example: 3f2504e0-4f89-41d3-9a0c-0305e82c3301

Get file download URL › Headers

X-Facility-Id
string

Facility Registry (FR) code identifying the facility. Required when authenticating with a service-account token.

Example: FID-47-115307-8
X-Facility-Id-Type
string

Type of identifier supplied in X-Facility-Id. Currently only fr-code is supported.

Example: fr-code

Get file download URL › Responses

Pre-signed URL generated successfully

Standard success response format for all successful operations.
object

@Description Response data payload containing operation details @Example {"status": "success"}

message
string

@Description Success message describing the operation result @Example "Visit has been successfully started"

GET/uploads/{file_id}
curl --request GET \
  --url https://ilm-dev.dha.go.ke/uat-middleware/api/v1/uploads/:file_id
shell
Example Responses
{
  "data": {},
  "message": "message"
}
json
application/json
PreauthsPreauth Doctor Consent
